_meta.description: Authoritative numeric stop rules and gates for all pipeline phases. All phase completion checks reference this file. Thresholds may be overridden per-app in scope.yaml coverage_targets.
_meta.override_precedence: scope.yaml coverage_targets override these defaults where specified

observed_chokepoint_min_pct.description: Minimum percent of chokepoints with confidence_class=Observed. Below this threshold status=Conditional, not Failed. Runtime confirmation deferred to Phase 5.

critical_observed_chokepoint_pct.description: At least one Observed chokepoint must exist among CRITICAL-tier entries. Zero Observed on any CRITICAL chokepoint = Failed regardless of other gates.

certification_status_rules.Certified: All hard gates pass AND observed_chokepoint_pct >= observed_chokepoint_min_pct
certification_status_rules.Conditional: All hard gates pass AND observed_chokepoint_pct < observed_chokepoint_min_pct AND critical_observed_chokepoint_pct > 0
certification_status_rules.Failed: Any hard gate fails OR critical_observed_chokepoint_pct == 0

phase_01a.failure_action: status = Failed; block Phase 2 for this component; trigger instrumentation_recovery playbook
phase_01a.conditional_action: status = Conditional; Phase 2 proceeds; flag for Phase 5 runtime confirmation; record in cert_report.json

source_event_count.description: At least one SOURCE event per replay session

sink_event_count.description: At least one SINK event per replay session

boundary_event_count.description: At least one BOUNDARY_READ or BOUNDARY_WRITE event per replay session

phase_05.failure_action: preflight_pass = false; do not proceed to Phase 7 or Phase 9; trigger instrumentation_recovery playbook

coverage_delta_pct.description: Must add new nodes or edges vs Phase 5 baseline

non_idempotent_cohort_sandboxed.description: Must be verified before replay starts, not after

phase_07.failure_action: do not merge replay trace into main DB; root-cause auth/session failures before retrying

max_unresolved_service_hops.description: More than this requires manual trace propagation audit; override per app

phase_08.failure_action: list all unresolved hops in output; flag for manual trace propagation header audit

static_only_promoted_to_confirmed.description: Zero STATIC_ONLY findings may be promoted to CONFIRMED without runtime evidence

phase_09.failure_action: do not advance to Phase 12; route to contradiction_resolution playbook; assign owner per unresolved contradiction

fixes_without_evidence_citation.description: Every fix must have at least one evidence_row_id or evidence_file_path

phase_10.failure_action: reject entire output batch; re-run with stricter evidence-link constraints; log to tool_bug_candidates.json

rules.description: Coverage delta below threshold for 2 consecutive iterations
Overall coverage reached target from scope.yaml

escalation_rule.action: escalate to program owner with iteration log; do not continue iterating; a negative delta indicates regression

lineage_count_match.description: Count in integrity_report matches count in appmap_composed.db

phase_12.failure_action: do not publish snapshot; trigger snapshot_repair playbook; identify which phase introduced the inconsistency

lite_path.description: Minimum required phases when production traffic is unavailable

full_path.description: All phases including production traffic capture and replay
